_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Unlike Nf1 f/neo ; Hoxb7-Cre mice (11/16), and Nf1 f/f ; Hoxb7-Cre mice (7/13), Nf1 f/1809 ; Hoxb7-Cre mice did not develop pNFs
details: Nf1 f/f ; Hoxb7-Cre mice developed pNFs (7/13) at 6 months of age
